sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64876" key="malo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μαλόω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">μάλη</etym>) <sense id="n64876.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carry off under the arm, Mim.Oxy.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:413:43" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">413.43</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
